Who I Am

About Me.

I'm Meduri Harsha Naga Vardhan, a Designer & Developer from India with a B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering. I create beautiful, functional digital experiences — from pixel-perfect UI designs to full-stack web applications.

During my internship at RevivaGreen, I sole-developed the entire company website, designed their internal dashboard in Figma, and built Python backends — all within an Agile/Scrum environment ensuring 100% mobile responsiveness.

I use Gen AI to accelerate development and stay ahead of the curve in modern engineering.
